heading: Brown tree snake control program
label: 4728 Brown tree snake control program
text: The Task Force shall, within the program developed under , undertake a comprehensive, environmentally sound program in coordination with regional, territorial, State and local entities to control the brown tree snake (Boiga irregularis) in Guam and other areas where the species is established outside of its historic range.section 4722(a) of this title
